ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The user agent to use when making requests - Get from your browser to match clearence token
ast.target: 发出请求时使用的用户代理 - 从您的浏览器获取以匹配清除令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The clearance token from your browser cookies - cf_clearance
ast.target: 来自您浏览器 cookie 的清除令牌 - cf_clearance

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The session token to use when making requests - __Secure-next-auth.session-token
ast.target: 发出请求时使用的会话令牌 - __Secure-next-auth.session-token

ast.name: warn
ast.target: fetchSSE onMessage 发生意外错误

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Please configure the plugin.
Go to Settings > Canvas Conversation and fill the fields.
ast.target: 请配置插件。\n转到设置 > 画布对话并填写字段。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法提示 AI 结果。

ast.name: message
ast.source: ChatGPT timed out waiting for response

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings can be taken from your session of ChatGPT.
ast.target: 这些设置可以从您的 ChatGPT 会话中获取。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open your browser in the ChatGPT page, inspect the page, go to Application and then Cookies, and take the appropiete values.
ast.target: 在浏览器中打开 ChatGPT 页面，检查页面，转到应用程序然后 Cookie，并获取适当的值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For the user agent you can take it from any request from the Network tab in the inspector. Or run `navigator.userAgent` in the console.
ast.target: 对于用户代理，您可以从检查器中网络选项卡的任何请求中获取。或者在控制台中运行 `navigator.userAgent`。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The tokens refresh every few hours. If you get an error, try refreshing the tokens.
ast.target: 令牌每隔几小时刷新一次。如果遇到错误，请尝试刷新令牌。
